pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to explicitly target Java 21 source and target levels.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this configuration, the compiler may default to an older version or the property might not be picked up correctly by all tooling, leading to compilation errors for Java 21-specific syntax.
